items.speaker: Lanyan
items.text: Thank you very much, {PlayerName}. So, what do you think of the Flight Module?

options.text: It's nice seeing Jinzhou from above.

items.speaker: Lanyan
items.text: Interesting… You know, the Flight Module might be useful in the tourism sector. That's worth exploring as a business idea.

items.speaker: Lanyan
items.text: Hmm… seems like there's still room for improvement... I'll make a note of it.

items.speaker: Lanyan
items.text: Thank you for your compliment. The module has come a long way, but it's nowhere near perfect. There's always room to improve.

items.speaker: Lanyan
items.text: Anyway, that wraps up our test. Thank you for supporting the Huaxu Academy.

items.speaker: Lanyan
items.text: You can hold on to the Flight Module. Just be careful when using it.

items.speaker: Lanyan
items.text: Though I doubt someone as capable as you will run into much trouble.

items.speaker: Lanyan
items.text: Now, then. I'll be heading back to the Academy to sort out this data. If you ever run into any issues with the module, don't hesitate to contact me.
